title: M&E Engineer / Assistant Manager (Mechanical & Electrical)
description:
About the Company

well-established A1 main contractor with a strong track record in delivering residential, commercial, mixed-use, and infrastructure projects. The company is recognised for its technical expertise, quality workmanship, and ability to manage complex, large-scale developments from construction through completion.

With an experienced project team and in-house technical capabilities across Architectural, Civil & Structural, and M&E disciplines, the company places strong emphasis on design coordination, buildability, safety, and regulatory compliance. It maintains close working relationships with consultants, authorities, and subcontractors to ensure timely and successful project delivery.

The organisation offers a professional and structured environment with opportunities for career progression, technical development, and leadership growth, particularly for engineers and managers involved in major building projects.

About the Scope

Experienced M&E professional with strong exposure to Mechanical & Electrical works for building projects from construction through completion. Proven ability to coordinate multi-discipline interfaces, manage subcontractors, and deliver M&E systems in compliance with Singapore codes, authority requirements, and project specifications.

  • Managed Mechanical & Electrical (M&E) works for building projects from construction stage through TOP / CSC completion

  • Coordinated M&E shop drawings, BIM models, and site interfaces with Architectural, Structural, and Civil teams to resolve clashes and constructability issues

  • Supervised and coordinated M&E subcontractors to ensure works were executed safely, on schedule, and to required quality standards

  • Managed authority submissions, inspections, and approvals with relevant agencies including BCA, SCDF, PUB, SP Group, and NEA

  • Oversaw testing & commissioning (T&C), system integration, defects rectification, and preparation of handover documentation

  • Monitored M&E progress, costs, variations, and subcontractor claims, supporting commercial and project control requirements

  • Ensured full compliance with contract specifications, Singapore Codes of Practice, and WSH requirements

  • Identified, coordinated, and resolved site coordination, technical, and construction issues in a timely manner

  • Prepared and managed RFIs, technical clarifications, and coordination records

  • Guided and mentored junior M&E engineers and site staff, providing technical direction and site support

  • Supported Project Manager in M&E planning, sequencing, and coordination matters (Assistant Manager level)

Qualification

  • Strong coordination across Mechanical, Electrical, Architectural, Structural, and Civil disciplines

  • Good understanding of M&E construction methods, testing, and commissioning

    How to Apply: Click Apply Now — or send your resume directly to Talent@BuildBridgePartners.com







    EA Details:
    EA Name: BuildBridge Partners Pte Ltd
    EA License No: 25C2918
    EA Reg No: R1551092 – Khoo Yan Jie

postedCompany.description:
We help companies secure the right leaders to accelerate growth and navigate complex markets.

BuildBridge Partners is a boutique executive search firm specializing in senior leadership and technical expertise across Asia’s key growth sectors, including Property Real Estate, Data Centre, Built Environment and Technology,

Our approach is focused and senior-led — no junior handoffs, no volume-based sourcing, and no generalist methods.

Every search is managed with strategic precision, deep sector intelligence, and direct senior accountability.

We work with market-leading organizations that require specialized expertise and deliver leadership talent solutions aligned with their strategic goals — helping you build teams that perform.
